name: Padang Padang
notes: Also called Padang Padang Lefts. Needs a solid SW/SSW swell to turn on; higher tides are safer, while low tide is heavier and more critical.
description: Padang Padang is Bali's famous left-hand barrel, often called the Balinese Pipeline. It breaks from deep water onto a shallow reef under the cliff at Padang Padang beach and can produce multiple barrel sections before releasing into the channel. It is a world-class wave but only suitable for skilled surfers when the swell is large enough.
